Ontario's Minister of Economic Development, Trade and Job Creation visited Waterloo to announce a $14.9 million for quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: made the announcement at the Quantum Valley Ideas Lab in the University of Waterloo research and technology park
occurrence_sentence: The announcement was made at the Quantum Valley Ideas Lab in the University of Waterloo research and technology park.

The province of Ontario has invested millions in the emerging field of quantum technology, aimed at enhancing the capabilities of antennas used in smartphones, vehicles, drones, cell towers, and aircraft, [the Waterloo Region Record reports](https://www.therecord.com/news/waterloo-region/minister-of-economic-development-goes-quantum-in-waterloo/article_a1849e07-ad63-5438-a73b-d326370a90a4.html).
